NTC OF MTN FOR PROTECTIVE ORDER, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES FILED BY DEFENDANT STATE OF CALIFORNIA BY AND THROUGH DEPARTMENT OF TRANSPORATION HEARING SET FOR AUG-08-2007 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF SCOTT RAINEY'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT: SUMMARY ADJUDICATION. ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING: GRANTED AS TO THE FIFTH CAUSE OF ACTION FOR DECLARATORY RELIEF. AN ACTUAL CONTROVERSY EXISTS. PLAINTIFF'S EVIDENCE ESTABLISHES AN UNCONTESTED USE FOR FIVE YEARS UNDER B & P CODE SECTION 5216.1. THE FACTS ALSO ESTABLISH THAT THE STATE IS ESTOPPED FROM CHALLENGING PLAINTIFF'S ADVERTISING HAVING WAITED EIGHT YEARS TO ISSUE A CITATION AND THEN FAILING TO PROVE THE VIOLATION DESPITE ORDERS FROM THE COURT TO DO SO. PLAINTIFF'S OTHER CLAIMS ARE DENIED ONLY BECAUSE THE STATE HAS RAISED TRIABLE ISSUES OF FACT AS TO PLAINTIFF'S DAMAGES. THE COURT STATES ITS RULINGS ON A PORTION OF THE EVIDENTIARY OBJECTIONS, AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD. COURT SIGNS AN ORDER ON THE BALANCE OF DEFENDANT'S EVIDENTIARY OBJECTIONS. MR. BOWLES IS TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER IN COMPLIANCE WITH SECTION 437C. JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: LAURA MARTINEZ, CSR 11332
